## FacetsXEvents.UserClickedAFilter property

The user has clicked any kind of filter. Payload: The clicked filter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
UserClickedAFilter: Filter;
```

## Remarks

This event does not imply changing the selection state of the filter. Business logic can prevent the filter from changing its state.
